title: cochleanthes flabelliformis
intro: Cochleanthes flabelliformis, also known as the fan orchid, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cochleanthes flabelliformis include its potential to soothe coughs, relieve congestion, and act as an expectorant. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to treat a range of respiratory ailments.
